Bash(python3 -c "
import os
os.environ['YOLO_TELEMETRY'] = 'False'
import numpy as np
from core.bar_config import BarConfig
from core.shift import ShiftManager
from core.config import DrinkCountRules
from core.analytics.drink_counter import DrinkCounter

cfg = BarConfig.load\('bar_main'\)
shift = ShiftManager\('test_shift', [{'name': 'Alice', 'station_id': 'test', 'color': '#f97316'}]\)
rules = DrinkCountRules\(\)
W, H = 2622, 1206
dc = DrinkCounter\(cfg, shift, rules, W, H\)

cx = 0.5 * W
cy_work = 0.35 * H    # above bar line \(bartender side\)
cy_serve = 0.50 * H   # below bar line \(customer side\)

print\('--- Building prep frames \(bartender at working position\) ---'\)
for i in range\(10\):
    evs = dc.update\(i, i/18.0, np.array\([[cx, cy_work]]\), [1], [0.7]\)
    print\(f'  frame {i}: prep_frames={dc._states[1].prep_frames}, side_buf={dc._states[1].serve_side_buffer[-3:]}'\)

print\('--- Bartender serves \(crosses bar line to customer side\) ---'\)
for i in range\(10, 14\):
    evs = dc.update\(i, i/18.0, np.array\([[cx, cy_serve]]\), [1], [0.7]\)
    if evs:
        print\(f'  DRINK DETECTED at frame {i}! Events: {evs}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  frame {i}: prep={dc._states[1].prep_frames}, buf={dc._states[1].serve_side_buffer[-3:]}, last_side={dc._states[1].last_confirmed_side}'\)

print\('--- Bartender returns ---'\)
for i in range\(14, 18\):
    evs = dc.update\(i, i/18.0, np.array\([[cx, cy_work]]\), [1], [0.7]\)
    if evs: print\(f'  Event at {i}: {evs}'\)

print\(\)
print\(f'Total drinks for Alice: {shift.records[\\"Alice\\"].total_drinks}'\)
print\(f'Unassigned: {dc._unassigned_serves}'\)
")

import os, json, sys
os.environ['YOLO_TELEMETRY'] = 'False'
os.environ['ULTRALYTICS_AUTOINSTALL'] = 'False'
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from core.bar_config import BarConfig
from core.shift import ShiftManager
from core.config import MODEL_PROFILES, DEFAULT_RULES
from core.tracking.engine import VenueProcessor
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile

vid = 'data/uploads/preview/ScreenRecording_03-05-2026 16-22-42_1.MP4'
cfg = BarConfig.load\('bar_main'\)
shift = ShiftManager\('diag', [{'name': 'Bartender1', 'station_id': 'test', 'color': '#f97316'}]\)

result_dir = Path\('/tmp/vs_test_run'\)
result_dir.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)

def prog\(p, msg\):
    print\(f'  [{p:.0f}%] {msg}'\)

proc = VenueProcessor\(
    job_id='diag_001',
    analysis_mode='drink_count',
    source=vid,
    source_type='file',
    model_profile='balanced',
    bar_config=cfg,
    shift=shift,
    extra_config={},
    result_dir=str\(result_dir\),
    annotate=False,
    progress_cb=prog,
\)

print\('Running video processing...'\)
summary = proc.run\(\)
print\(\)
print\('=== RESULTS ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(summary, indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

os.environ['ULTRALYTICS_AUTOINSTALL'] = 'False'

from pathlib import Path

Bash(python3 -c "
import cv2
vid = 'data/uploads/preview/ScreenRecording_03-06-2026 10-37-46_1.MP4'
cap = cv2.VideoCapture\(vid\)
fps = cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS\)
for t in range\(5, 220, 15\):
    f = int\(t * fps\)
    cap.set\(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, f\)
    ret, frame = cap.read\(\)
    if ret: cv2.imwrite\(f'/tmp/frames/v2_chk_{t:03d}s.jpg', frame\)
cap.release\(\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "
import os, json, shutil
os.environ['YOLO_TELEMETRY'] = 'False'
os.environ['ULTRALYTICS_AUTOINSTALL'] = 'False'
from core.bar_config import BarConfig
from core.shift import ShiftManager
from core.tracking.engine import VenueProcessor
from pathlib import Path

for vid_key, vid, dur in [
    \('v1', 'data/uploads/preview/ScreenRecording_03-05-2026 16-22-42_1.MP4', 91.9\),
    \('v2', 'data/uploads/preview/ScreenRecording_03-06-2026 10-37-46_1.MP4', 220.9\),
]:
    cfg = BarConfig.load\('bar_main'\)
    shift = ShiftManager\('test', [{'name': 'Bartender1', 'station_id': 'test', 'color': '#f97316'}]\)
    rd = Path\(f'/tmp/vs_{vid_key}c'\)
    if rd.exists\(\): shutil.rmtree\(rd\)
    rd.mkdir\(\)
    proc = VenueProcessor\(job_id=f'test_{vid_key}', analysis_mode='drink_count',
        source=vid, source_type='file', model_profile='balanced',
        bar_config=cfg, shift=shift, extra_config={},
        result_dir=str\(rd\), annotate=False, progress_cb=lambda p,m:None\)
    s = proc.run\(\)
    drinks = s['bartenders']['Bartender1']['total_drinks']
    snaps = sorted\(rd.joinpath\('snapshots'\).iterdir\(\)\)
    print\(f'{vid_key} \({dur}s\): {drinks} drinks detected'\)
    for snap in snaps:
        print\(f'  {snap.name}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

import json
from pathlib import Path
from core.config import RESULT_DIR
for jid in ['c5817fd0','443276de','54b80828','9d44cc1c']:
    rdir = Path\(RESULT_DIR\)/jid
    sumf = rdir/'summary.json'
    if sumf.exists\(\):
        s = json.loads\(sumf.read_text\(\)\)
        bt = s.get\('bartenders',{}\)
        clips = list\(\(rdir/'clips'\).glob\('*.mp4'\)\) if \(rdir/'clips'\).exists\(\) else []
        drinks = sum\(b.get\('total_drinks',0\) for b in bt.values\(\)\)
        names = list\(bt.keys\(\)\)
        print\(f'{jid}: bartenders={names} drinks={drinks} clips={len\(clips\)}'\)
        if s.get\(\\"drink_quality\\",{}\).get\(\\"warnings\\"\):
            print\(f'  WARNINGS: {s[\\"drink_quality\\"][\\"warnings\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
from core.config import DB_PATH
con = sqlite3.connect\(str\(DB_PATH\)\)
cur = con.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT job_id, analysis_mode, status, shift_json FROM jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10'\)
rows = cur.fetchall\(\)
for row in rows:
    jid, mode, status, sj = row
    if sj:
        d = json.loads\(sj\)
        bartenders = d.get\('bartenders', 'N/A'\)
    else:
        bartenders = None
    print\(f'{jid} | {mode} | {status} | bartenders: {bartenders}'\)
con.close\(\)
")

    sumf = Path\(RESULT_DIR\) / jid / 'summary.json'
    if sumf.exists\(\):
        s = json.loads\(sumf.read_text\(\)\)
        score, color, label = compute_confidence_score\(s\)
        print\(f'{jid}: {score}% {color} — {label}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import numpy as np, cv2
from core.preprocessing import \(
    auto_gamma_correction, upscale_for_detection,
    detect_night_mode, night_mode_enhance, enhance_for_detection
\)

dark = np.full\(\(480, 640, 3\), 25, dtype=np.uint8\)
print\(f'Gamma fix: {dark.mean\(\):.0f} -> {auto_gamma_correction\(dark, 100\).mean\(\):.0f}  \(target ~100\)'\)

sd = np.zeros\(\(480, 640, 3\), dtype=np.uint8\)
print\(f'Upscale: {sd.shape[:2]} -> {upscale_for_detection\(sd, 720\).shape[:2]}'\)

bw = np.stack\([np.full\(\(100,100\), 80, dtype=np.uint8\)]*3, axis=2\)
color = np.random.randint\(0, 200, \(100,100,3\), dtype=np.uint8\)
color[:,:,0] = color[:,:,0] + 40  # make channels differ
print\(f'Night detect B&W: {detect_night_mode\(bw\)}, color: {detect_night_mode\(color\)}'\)

result = enhance_for_detection\(dark.copy\(\), 'strong'\)
print\(f'Strong pipeline: {dark.mean\(\):.0f} -> {result.mean\(\):.0f}'\)
result2 = enhance_for_detection\(np.full\(\(480,640,3\), 60, dtype=np.uint8\), 'light'\)
print\(f'Light pipeline: 60 -> {result2.mean\(\):.0f}'\)
print\('All tests passed'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import cv2
cap = cv2.VideoCapture\('/Users/opentab/Downloads/ScreenRecording_03-09-2026 15.mov'\)
fps = cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS\)
total = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT\)\)
W = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH\)\)
H = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT\)\)
dur = total / fps if fps else 0
cap.release\(\)
print\(f'Resolution: {W}x{H}'\)
print\(f'FPS: {fps:.1f}'\)
print\(f'Frames: {total}'\)
print\(f'Duration: {dur:.1f}s \({dur/60:.1f} min\)'\)
")

import json, sys, tempfile

from core.tracking.engine import VenueProcessor
from core.config import MODEL_PROFILES
from core.bar_config import BarConfig

bar_config = BarConfig.load\('ch9_overhead'\)

profile_name = 'low_quality'

ec = {
    'enhance_strength': 'strong',
    'dewarp': False,
    'adaptive_conf': True
}

result_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)

engine = VenueProcessor\(
    job_id='test_ch9_001',
    source=Path\('/Users/opentab/Downloads/ScreenRecording_03-09-2026 15.mov'\),
    source_type='file',
    analysis_mode='drink_count',
    model_profile=profile_name,
    bar_config=bar_config,
    shift=None,
    extra_config=ec,
    result_dir=result_dir,
    annotate=False,
    progress_cb=lambda pct, msg: print\(f'[{pct:3d}%] {msg}'\)
\)
result = engine.run\(\)
print\(\)
print\('=== RESULT ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
